collections.name: users
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_users_codigo_unique` ON `users` (codigo) WHERE codigo != ''

collections.name: financial_categories
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_financial_categories_name ON financial_categories (name)

collections.name: contract_templates
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_contract_templates_name ON contract_templates (name)

collections.name: distribution_calculations
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_dist_calc_date ON distribution_calculations (date DESC)
